name: kodi-for-seniors
description: Tooling configuration for the kodi-for-seniors repository

scripts.lint:xml: xmllint --noout skin.kodi4seniors/addon.xml skin.kodi4seniors/xml/Font.xml skin.kodi4seniors/xml/Includes.xml skin.kodi4seniors/xml/Home.xml skin.kodi4seniors/xml/Settings.xml skin.kodi4seniors/xml/MyPVRChannels.xml skin.kodi4seniors/xml/MyPVRGuide.xml skin.kodi4seniors/xml/DialogButtonMenu.xml
scripts.validate: npm run lint:python && npm run lint:xml && npm run build
